hero.heading: Eagle Rock's Trusted Barber Since Day One
hero.subheading: 93 five-star reviews, a 4.6 rating, and the neighborhood barber shop where every cut is done right. Walk-ins welcome on Eagle Rock Blvd.

about.heading: Your Neighborhood Barber
paragraphs: Eagle Rock Barber Shop is the kind of place where you walk in as a customer and leave as a regular. We've been serving the Eagle Rock community with classic cuts, modern fades, and friendly service.
With 93 reviews and a 4.6-star rating, our barbers have built a loyal following through skill, consistency, and genuine care. No gimmicks — just great haircuts.
Open 7 days a week. Walk-ins always welcome.

services.title: Haircuts
services.description: Classic cuts, fades, tapers, and modern styles for men and boys. Tailored to your look.

services.title: Fades & Lineups
services.description: Clean fades, sharp lineups, and crisp edges. Precision work that lasts.

services.title: Beard Trims
services.description: Full beard shaping, trims, and edge-ups to keep your facial hair looking sharp.

services.title: Hot Towel Shave
services.description: Relaxing hot towel straight razor shave for the smoothest finish possible.

reviews.name: Carlos R.
reviews.text: Best barber shop in Eagle Rock. My barber always nails the fade. Consistent quality every visit.

reviews.name: Brian T.
reviews.text: Great neighborhood spot. Fair prices, skilled barbers, and no pretension. Just good cuts.

reviews.name: Andre M.
reviews.text: I've been going here for years. The barbers know what they're doing and the atmosphere is always welcoming.

reviews.name: James L.
reviews.text: Walk-in friendly and they don't rush. My kids love coming here too. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Steven K.
reviews.text: Eagle Rock Barber Shop is a gem. Old school barbering done right in a modern setting.

contact.address: 4908 N Eagle Rock Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90041
